text:
Morning speed drills 🏃‍♂️💨
Working on acceleration and footwork this week — small improvements every day add up. What’s everyone training for right now?

NBA nights > everything 🏀
That fourth quarter had me stressed.

Back & shoulders today 💪
Not every workout feels amazing, but showing up always counts.

Recovery is part of the grind too.
Stretching, foam rolling, and dialing in sleep this week. Performance starts before you step on the court.

Lower body day = no walking tomorrow 😅
Squats, lunges, sled pushes. Staying consistent even when motivation dips. Discipline > motivation.

Nothing like an open road and red rock views 🏜️
Spontaneous weekend drive and I don’t regret it one bit.

Tried making homemade pizza tonight 🍕
Not perfect, but way better than I expected. Cooking has been my new way to unwind after busy days.

Added a few new plants to the space this week 🌿
Slowly turning my apartment into a little indoor jungle.
